meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no design skills (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing for Non-Designers (Beginner)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with design. Learn how to architect professional SaaS pricing tables using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress your clients instantly.
content.answer_block: You don't need a design degree to ship high-converting SaaS pricing. By leveraging component-first frameworks with Antigravity and the autonomous reasoning of Claude Code, you can generate pixel-perfect, responsive pricing tables. This modular approach ensures professional aesthetics while allowing you to focus on high-value logic and client deliverables.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the client's deadline is looming, and your pricing page looks like a relic from the early 2000s. Design isn't your superpower, and that’s perfectly fine. In the freelance world, speed is the currency, and aesthetic polish is the tax you pay to keep your clients happy.

We are shifting the paradigm. Instead of wrestling with CSS grids or agonizing over typography, you will use AI-driven architecture to build modular, high-conversion pricing components. By combining the rapid prototyping power of Antigravity with the deep context awareness of Claude Code, you can ship world-class UI in minutes, not days.

steps.title: Define the Value Tiers
steps.description: Before coding, map out your SaaS tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise). Claude Code excels at turning business logic into structured JSON data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive JSON schema for a 3-tier SaaS pricing model including features, pricing, and highlight flags.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a pricing schema based on standard SaaS industry best practices'

steps.title: Bootstrap the UI Component
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold a modern, minimalist pricing card component using Tailwind CSS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React pricing component using Tailwind. Use a dark-mode theme, include hover effects, and ensure accessibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'generate a responsive pricing component using Tailwind CSS for a modern SaaS dashboard'

steps.title: Inject Dynamic Content
steps.description: Bind your JSON schema to the UI. This makes your pricing page maintainable for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the pricing component to map over an array of tier objects rather than hardcoded HTML.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor 'map the pricing component to accept dynamic data from a JSON object'

steps.title: Implement Conversion Triggers
steps.description: Add subtle psychological nudges like 'Most Popular' badges or countdown timers to improve conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a 'Most Popular' badge with a subtle pulse animation to the Pro tier card.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'implement a pulse animation for the highlight badge in the pricing card'

steps.title: Cross-Device QA
steps.description: Ensure the layout doesn't break on mobile. Claude Code can perform visual regression checks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the pricing component for mobile responsiveness and ensure touch targets are at least 44px.
steps.claude_code_command: claude audit 'check component for mobile responsiveness and accessibility compliance'

pro_tips: Always use a 3-tier structure; psychological research proves the middle option is the most selected.
Use CSS variables for colors so the client can change the brand theme in one file later.
Avoid excessive animations; they distract from the conversion goal of the CTA button.
Place the CTA button at the bottom of the card and use a high-contrast color that doesn't appear elsewhere on the page.
Include a 'FAQ' section immediately below the pricing table to handle common objections before they leave the page.
content.next_steps: Once the pricing page is live, integrate a payment gateway like Stripe using the same modular approach to ensure the entire checkout flow is as seamless as your UI.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design friction slow down your freelance career. Build faster, charge more, and deliver premium results that make your clients look like industry leaders. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
